steps: 1. Break down the words: 'three hundred and fifty-two thousand' means 352,000. 2. 'and fourteen' means adding 14. 3. Combine: 352,000 + 14 = 352,014. 4. Check options: A) 352,014 matches. B) 352,140 is 352,140 (wrong). C) 350,214 is 350,214 (wrong). D) 352,040 is 352,040 (wrong). E) 300,52014 is not a standard five/six-digit number (wrong).
